LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT PV HOLDING CORP AND AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. THE MOHSENI DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON, BY TELEPHONE, OR BY VIDEO CONFERENCE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY AUGUST 22, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PV HOLDING CORP AND AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The Mohseni declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the complaint is now due by August 22, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
